# desearch-cli

CLI tool for Desearch AI — a contextual AI search engine that aggregates results across web, Hacker News, Reddit, Wikipedia, YouTube, Twitter/X, and arXiv with AI-synthesized answers and citations.

Single binary, no Python or Node.js dependencies.

## Commands

### `search` (default)
```bash
desearch [query] [flags]
```
Search across all or specified sources. This is the default command.

### `completion`
```bash
desearch completion <query> [flags]
```
Stream an AI-generated summary without per-source search results.

### `config`
```bash
desearch config [flags]
```
Manage API key and default settings.

### `version`
```bash
desearch version
```
Show version information.

### `docs`
```bash
desearch docs [flags]
```
Print full documentation.

### `skill`
```bash
desearch skill [flags]
```
Manage Claude Code skill.

## Search Flags

| Flag | Type | Description |
|------|------|-------------|
| `--query string` | string | Search prompt (also the positional arg) |
| `--tool strings` | []string | Sources to query: web, hackernews, reddit, wikipedia, youtube, twitter, arxiv |
| `--date-filter string` | string | Date range: PAST_24_HOURS, PAST_2_DAYS, PAST_WEEK, PAST_2_WEEKS, PAST_MONTH, PAST_2_MONTHS, PAST_YEAR, PAST_2_YEARS |
| `--start-date string` | string | ISO8601 UTC start bound |
| `--end-date string` | string | ISO8601 UTC end bound |
| `--streaming` | bool | Stream results as they arrive |
| `--result-type string` | string | ONLY_LINKS or LINKS_WITH_FINAL_SUMMARY |
| `--count int` | int | Results per source, 10-200 (default: 10) |
| `--system-message string` | string | Override system prompt |
| `--json` | bool | Output raw JSON |
| `--no-ai` | bool | Skip AI completion/summary |

## Global Flags

| Flag | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `--api-key string` | API key for authentication (overrides config file) |
| `--config string` | config file path (default ~/.config/desearch-cli/config.toml) |
| `-v, --verbose` | Show verbose progress output |
| `-V, --version` | Print version |

## Configuration

See: [docs/config.md](docs/config.md)

## API

See: [openapi.json](openapi.json)

## Install

```bash
# Homebrew
brew tap roboalchemist/tap
brew install desearch

# Or download from releases page
```

## Quick Start

```bash
# Set API key
desearch config --api-key sk-xxxx

# Search
desearch "golang best practices"
```
